'''tarogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fcking|fcking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fcking|fcking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tarogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæregeth|tæregeth]] || [[word:tæregej|tæregej]] || [[word:tæregesh|tæregesh]] || [[word:tærege|tærege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tarorogoth|tarorogoth]] || [[word:tarorogoj|tarorogoj]] || [[word:tarorogosh|tarorogosh]] || [[word:tarorogo|tarorogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tarogoth|tarogoth]] || [[word:tarogoj|tarogoj]] || [[word:tarogosh|tarogosh]] || [[word:tarogo|tarogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tarofgoth|tarofgoth]] || [[word:tarofgoj|tarofgoj]] || [[word:tarofgosh|tarofgosh]] || [[word:tarofgof|tarofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tarogotho|tarogotho]] || [[word:tarogojo|tarogojo]] || [[word:tarogosho|tarogosho]] || [[word:tarogoko|tarogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tarogoth|tarogoth]] || [[word:tarogoj|tarogoj]] || [[word:tarogosh|tarogosh]] || [[word:tarogo|tarogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tarogothol|tarogothol]] || [[word:tarogojol|tarogojol]] || [[word:tarogoshol|tarogoshol]] || [[word:tarogokol|tarogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tarogothotho|tarogothotho]] || [[word:tarogojojo|tarogojojo]] || [[word:tarogoshosho|tarogoshosho]] || [[word:tarogoko|tarogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tarogothon|tarogothon]] || [[word:tarogojon|tarogojon]] || [[word:tarogoshon|tarogoshon]] || [[word:tarogokon|tarogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tarogothoro|tarogothoro]] || [[word:tarogojoro|tarogojoro]] || [[word:tarogoshoro|tarogoshoro]] || [[word:tarogokoro|tarogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
